payload.answer: The new statement may add a relationship fact rather than conflict with the existing high-confidence memory. Existing memory says Sara is Daniele's daughter and Nur's twin; the new fact says Sara is the user's niece. These can all be true simultaneously depending on the user's relationship to Daniele or Sara's other parent, so this is a conflict candidate only for review/entity resolution, not a contradiction on its face.
